_agent_notes: Nothing UNPARSED. Nurse (local 1, LOCALID_SLATEPORT_NURSE) delegates to shared Common_EventScript_PkmnCenterNurse in data/scripts/pkmn_center_nurse.inc; all branches traced (gold card via CountPlayerTrainerStars==4 + FLAG_NURSE_MENTIONS_GOLD_CARD, pokerus via FLAG_POKERUS_EXPLAINED + IsPokerusInParty, union room reminder via FLAG_NURSE_UNION_ROOM_REMINDER). Specials (CountPlayerTrainerStars etc.) are engine code, recorded as-is. No trainerbattle/giveitem anywhere in this map's script tree. Sailor and Woman are simple unconditional MSGBOX_NPC.

dialogue.text: Hello, and welcome to the POKéMON CENTER. We restore your tired POKéMON to full health. Would you like to rest your POKéMON?
We hope to see you again!
Okay, I'll take your POKéMON for a few seconds.
Thank you for waiting. We've restored your POKéMON to full health.

dialogue.condition: FLAG_POKERUS_EXPLAINED not set AND IsPokerusInParty == TRUE
dialogue.text: Your POKéMON may be infected with POKéRUS. Little is known about the POKéRUS except that they are microscopic life-forms that attach to POKéMON. While infected, POKéMON are said to grow exceptionally well.

Th-that card… Could it be… The GOLD CARD?! Oh, the gold color is brilliant! The four stars seem to sparkle! I've seen several TRAINERS with a SILVER CARD before, but, {PLAYER}, you're the first TRAINER I've ever seen with a GOLD CARD! Okay, {PLAYER}, please allow me the honor of resting your POKéMON!
I'm delighted to see you, {PLAYER}! You want the usual, am I right?
We hope to see you again!

dialogue.condition: union room: VAR_0x8008 == 1 AND FLAG_NURSE_UNION_ROOM_REMINDER not set
dialogue.text: It appears as if {STR_VAR_1} is playing right now. Go for it!

Want a tip for battling? I'd say it's raising different kinds of POKéMON in a balanced manner. It's no good to make just one POKéMON strong. If it has a type disadvantage, it might not stand a chance.
I trade POKéMON with my friends. If a traded POKéMON is holding an item, it makes me twice as happy!
